name: Megalith Aratron
name_jp: メガリス・アラトロン
desc: You can Ritual Summon this card with a "Megalith" card. During the Main Phase (Quick Effect): You can discard this card; Ritual Summon 1 "Megalith" Ritual Monster from your hand, by Tributing monsters from your hand or field whose total Levels equal or exceed its Level. When your opponent activates a card or effect that targets a card you control (Quick Effect): You can place 1 Ritual Monster from your GY on the bottom of the Deck, and if you do, negate that activation, and if you do that, destroy it. You can only use each effect of "Megalith Aratron" once per turn.
mnst_eff: You can Ritual Summon this card with a "Megalith" card. During the Main Phase (Quick Effect): You can discard this card; Ritual Summon 1 "Megalith" Ritual Monster from your hand, by Tributing monsters from your hand or field whose total Levels equal or exceed its Level. When your opponent activates a card or effect that targets a card you control (Quick Effect): You can place 1 Ritual Monster from your GY on the bottom of the Deck, and if you do, negate that activation, and if you do that, destroy it. You can only use each effect of "Megalith Aratron" once per turn.
eff: You can Ritual Summon this card with a "Megalith" card. You can only use each effect of "Megalith Aratron" once per turn.

action: Activates if targeted by card effect
Returns from your Graveyard to your Deck
mst: Negates the activation of your opponent's Effect Monster's effect
Negates the activation of your opponent's Spell Cards
Negates the activation of your opponent's Trap Cards
